Krishṇa, in order to destroy Kāla-yavana, enticed him into the cave where Mućukund was asleep, and the latter, being thus roused, cast upon Kāla-yavana an angry glance which reduced him to ashes'; see translation of Vishṇu-Purāṇa, p. 567); — name of a son of Yadu; of the father of Ćandra-bhāga; of a poet of Kaśmīr; of a demon
